productDisplayName: Lotto Men Basketball Mid Black Sports Shoe
description: Designed for those who love to win those live wire games in style, this Basket Ball Mid shoe from lotto comes in a sleek silhouette and is packed with state of the art features. Upper Synthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays and perforations on the forefoot and midfoot for breathability Mid-ankle for better support to the lower leg Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar with a fabric lining for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movement Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
